summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Volume Bot Admin Panel. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified login screen, dashboard, bot controls (start/stop), config form, wallet management, and error handling - all working correctly.

test_classes: TestAdminLogin (3 tests): login success, wrong password 401, empty password 401
TestBotStatusEndpoint (3 tests): status with auth, without auth 401, wrong auth 401
TestBotStartStop (4 tests): start/stop with auth, start/stop without auth 401
TestBotConfig (4 tests): config update, partial update, without auth 401, restore defaults
TestWalletManagement (6 tests): get wallets, add invalid key error, auth checks, delete nonexistent
TestBotStartStopCycle (1 test): full lifecycle test (stop->status->start->status->start again->stop->verify)

admin_login_screen.wrong_password_login: SUCCESS - shows error toast 'Nieprawidlowe haslo', stays on login

admin_dashboard.transaction_log: Section visible, shows 'Brak transakcji' when empty

critical_code_review_comments: Admin authentication properly implemented with x-admin-password header
All admin endpoints correctly return 401 when auth header is missing or invalid
Bot start/stop lifecycle works correctly with proper state management
Config updates are persisted and returned in response
Wallet validation correctly rejects invalid private keys with clear error message
Frontend uses sessionStorage for admin password persistence (appropriate for admin panel)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
UI is in Polish language (Zatrzymany, Aktywny, Konfiguracja, etc.)
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing bot state and config
context_for_next_testing_agent: Volume Bot Admin Panel fully tested. All API endpoints working: /api/admin/login, /api/admin/bot/status, /api/admin/bot/start, /api/admin/bot/stop, /api/admin/bot/config, /api/admin/wallets (GET/POST/DELETE). Frontend admin panel at /admin route works correctly with login, dashboard, bot controls, config form, and wallet management. Note: Actual Solana transactions cannot be tested without real private keys - the bot will start but won't execute trades without wallets. UI is in Polish language.
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All features working as expected.
